signals.headline: Treasury Department names AI-risk finance officer role in final guidance
signals.summary: Treasury's finalized guidance on AI in financial services names a required 'AI Risk Finance Officer' role at every institution above $10B in assets. Publicly-traded companies have 12 months to comply.

signals.headline: Rogo ships 'Deal Team Copilot' with M&A data room ingestion
signals.summary: Rogo announced a copilot that ingests entire data rooms and answers questions about financials, contracts, and dependencies in natural language. Positioned directly at IB deal teams.

signals.headline: 'AI close cycle benchmark' is trending on LinkedIn after Stripe's close-in-2-days post
signals.summary: A LinkedIn post from Stripe's Controller claiming a 2-day month-end close went viral (14k reactions) and sparked a debate about realistic benchmarks at scale. Competitors are chiming in with their own numbers.

signals.headline: Ramp announces 'Autopilot Close' with journal entry generation for AP
signals.summary: Ramp extended its spend management suite with AI-generated journal entries tied directly to card and bill transactions. Auto-close aims at mid-market finance teams already using Ramp for AP.

signals.headline: Agentic AI for FP&A trends on Hacker News front page
signals.summary: A post titled 'Show HN: We replaced our FP&A analyst with Claude' hit #3 on Hacker News with 800+ comments debating whether agents can handle variance analysis and forecasting without human oversight.

signals.headline: CFOs googling 'how to evaluate AI finance tools' spikes 180% QoQ
signals.summary: Google Trends shows a sustained 6-week climb in buyer-intent searches around evaluating AI finance tools, with breakout queries including 'AI finance tool ROI,' 'AI agent vs RPA finance,' and 'finance AI audit trail.'
keywords: how to evaluate ai finance tools

signals.headline: New IDC survey: 73% of finance leaders piloting AI agents, only 14% in production
signals.summary: IDC's Q1 2026 finance automation report finds a widening pilot-to-production gap. Leaders cite data quality, auditability, and change management as top blockers.
keywords: moving ai from pilot to production

signals.headline: SEC proposes disclosure rules for AI-generated financial reporting
signals.summary: The SEC released a proposed rule requiring public companies to disclose when generative AI is used in the preparation of financial statements, including audit trail retention requirements. Comment period closes 60 days from publication.

signals.headline: Anthropic releases Claude Finance Suite with domain-tuned models for accounting workflows
signals.summary: Anthropic launched a finance-specialized version of Claude with built-in support for GAAP and IFRS accounting treatments, SOX controls vocabulary, and native integrations with NetSuite and Workday.

signals.headline: AICPA publishes draft guidance on AI agent use in audit engagements
signals.summary: The AICPA released draft professional guidance clarifying auditor responsibilities when clients use AI agents in financial close and reporting. Focuses on evidence documentation and agent output verification.

signals.headline: Stripe Q1 earnings: cites AI-driven finance team productivity as key margin driver
signals.summary: Stripe's Q1 shareholder letter attributes a 12-point improvement in G&A as a percentage of revenue to AI adoption across their finance and accounting teams. Specifically called out reductions in close cycle time and FP&A headcount growth.

signals.headline: Brex launches 'AI Controller' beta to 500 customer finance teams
signals.summary: Brex is testing an embedded AI agent that handles expense categorization, policy enforcement, and variance flagging inside their spend management platform.

signals.headline: Mercury Treasury adds agent-based cash forecasting for startup CFOs
signals.summary: Mercury shipped a new agent that projects 13-week cash flow using transaction history, expected invoices, and customer-specified forecast assumptions. Aimed at series A-C finance leads without dedicated FP&A staff.

signals.headline: Rogo publishes 'The Investment Banker's Guide to AI Agents' — 4,000-word pillar
signals.summary: Rogo dropped a long pillar post targeting IB analysts and associates, positioning their platform for deal-team use cases. Heavily optimized for queries like 'AI for investment banking' and 'LLM for M&A.'

signals.headline: Datarails publishes case study: 'How a $400M SaaS company cut close from 10 to 4 days'
signals.summary: Datarails released a customer case study with a specific close-cycle metric that competes directly with Concourse's positioning. The customer quote emphasizes integration with existing Excel workflows.

signals.headline: Numeric launches 'Close Agent' with month-end reconciliation automation
signals.summary: Numeric announced an AI agent specifically targeting the month-end close, handling reconciliations, journal entry generation, and flux commentary. Pricing starts at $2K/month.

signals.headline: Pigment publishes benchmark: 'State of AI in Enterprise FP&A 2026'
signals.summary: Pigment released a proprietary benchmark report surveying 1,200 enterprise FP&A leaders. Key stat: 62% use AI for variance commentary generation, up from 18% last year. Heavy organic traffic play.
keywords: state of ai in enterprise fp&a

signals.headline: Month-end close cycle times becoming a public CFO benchmark on LinkedIn
signals.summary: Multiple CFOs at growth-stage companies have been publicly posting their close cycle times on LinkedIn, driving comparison and community discussion. Concourse customers are well-positioned to contribute.

signals.headline: FASB opens comment period on AI-assisted estimates in financial reporting
signals.summary: FASB is soliciting comments on whether AI-assisted estimates (allowances, fair value, revenue accruals) require expanded disclosure. Directly affects how finance teams can deploy agents in GAAP-reporting workflows.
